title: PONT-8
body:
![PONT-8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OQkKFlhY/images/056fa176011586807356c052803e49606af39d58.png)

## PONT-8

This resource pack replaces the ascii character set of the **Minecraft** *font* with the **[PICO-8](https://www.lexaloffle.com/pico-8.php)** *[font](https://pico-8.fandom.com/wiki/P8SCII)*.

### Notes
> This font is very `ᴛɪɴʏ`, so its especially hard to see when its **bolded**.

> This pack supports versions `1.16` to `1.21.4`, but only `1.21.4` has been tested.

> If you are playing on any version `newer/older` than `1.21.4`, you will get a warning that says  
> `This pack was made for an older/newer version of Minecraft and may no longer work correctly.`  
> but just ignore it.
>
